summary: The diff implements all four requirements with substantial coverage. REQ-1 (store page with product grid), REQ-2 (cart + checkout + order submission + success page), REQ-3 (Internet Identity admin gating on both frontend and backend), and REQ-4 (admin dashboard with Products and Orders tabs) are all present. A few acceptance criteria have partial or unverifiable coverage given truncation, but the overall implementation is comprehensive. One notable concern is that the backend admin check relies on email-to-principal mapping rather than a hardcoded principal. The StoreOrder type only captures one product per order, consistent with the implementation of submitting one order per cart item.

missing_requirements.requirement: A checkout page collects customer name, email, shipping address, and order details; Submitting the checkout form creates a StoreOrder record in the backend
missing_requirements.reason: The shipping address is collected in the checkout form but the StoreOrder backend type has no address field, so the shipping address is not persisted in the backend record.

hallucinated_features.description: Gallery management tab in the admin dashboard
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only specifies Products and Orders tabs for the admin dashboard. A Gallery tab with full CRUD was added without being requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Payments management tab in the admin dashboard
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not specify a Payments tab. A fourth Payments tab for viewing payment confirmations was added without being requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Venmo payment proof upload on checkout and order success page
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request lists third-party payment processing as a non-goal and does not mention Venmo or payment proof upload. The checkout page includes optional Venmo payment proof file upload and the success page references Venmo payment verification.
